releaseNotes:
- v3.0.1 ajoute flashcard set review mode.
- Les ameliorations incluent Mermaid error logs, F13-F32 shortcuts, database relation-field behavior, des ameliorations mobile menu et database table view template columns.
- Les correctifs couvrent Azure OpenAI setup, inline markdown editing, database date export, plain-text paste et user-guide tab closing.
